Build accessible tooltip on hover/focus dismissible with Escape
Native title; no custom tooltip; no keyboard; no Escape

function @N@({text,children}){const[s,setS]=useState(false);const id=useId();const t=useRef(null);useEffect(()=>{if(!s)return;const h=e=>{if(e.key=="Escape")setS(false)};document.addEventListener("keydown",h);return()=>document.removeEventListener("keydown",h)},[s]);const en=()=>{clearTimeout(t.current);t.current=setTimeout(()=>setS(true),300)};const le=()=>{clearTimeout(t.current);setS(false)};return {children}{s&&{text}}}
